name: iOS URL Import Sheet
description: Tests the URL import flow on iOS: navigate to Models tab → tap URL import button → verify import sheet appears → type a HuggingFace URL → tap Import → verify status feedback → dismiss sheet. Validates the import UI without completing a real download.

steps.description: Wait for URL import sheet to appear.
Verify the URL text field and import button are present.
Type a sample HuggingFace URL into the URL field.
Tap the Import button to trigger validation.
Wait briefly for parsing status to appear.
